Jaime Lane
Founder · LINK Lake Norman™
Why This Community Hub Exists

"Local impact isn't regional. It isn't driving 30 minutes to feel like you're making a difference. Real impact happens in your own backyard."

LINK Lake Norman™ was built on a simple but powerful belief — that our communities thrive when businesses, nonprofits, and neighbors stop looking outward and start investing inward. The Lake Norman region has everything it needs. What it needs is connection, alignment, and people who show up.

Our nonprofits need to be fully funded, fully supported, and fully staffed with volunteers and workforce pipelines that come from within this community. Our businesses need to hire locally, give locally, and grow locally. Our neighbors need to know that the resources they need are right here — not 30 minutes away, not behind a website, not buried in a Google search.

This hub exists to solve that. It is the intersection of community, business, and nonprofit — a place where resources flow to where they are needed most, where boots are on the ground, and where economic and community vitality are built together, not in silos.

Seasons of Giving Lake Norman — Founded by Jaime Lane

What began as a mission to serve seniors living independently in need has grown into something far greater — an intergenerational movement of care, connection, and community impact. From weekly meals and companionship for isolated seniors to building bridges between generations, Seasons of Giving LKN is proof that one person showing up locally can change lives permanently.

🌱 Visit seasonsofgivinglkn.org →

How LINK™ Connects the Community

🤝
Quarterly Nonprofit Roundtables
LINK hosts quarterly connection events — not just networking, but real resource sharing and cross-sector collaboration.
🏢
Business ↔ Nonprofit Bridging
Connecting local businesses to nonprofits for volunteer days, in-kind donations, event sponsorships, and Lunch & Learns.
🎓
Future Ready™ Placements
Future Ready™ students were placed with nonprofit partners — giving students real experience while expanding org capacity.

🎓 Future Ready™ by LINK Lake Norman™

Student Portal

Future Ready™ connects career-ready young adults with vetted Lake Norman employers. Real mentorship. Real experience. Real pathways to your future.

Future Ready™ Program

🏫
Explore It™ — Middle School (7th & 8th)

Immersive career exploration for 7th & 8th graders. Build life skills, discover strengths, and chart a course before high school begins. Available for schools, pods & youth orgs.

📩 Connect With Us
🎓
Invest In It™ — High School & Beyond

Career-connected learning and mentorship that opens doors to trade school, college, certifications, or direct employment. Real connections to real employers across Lake Norman.

📩 Connect With Us
Interested in Future Ready™?

Reach out directly to learn about current program availability, upcoming cohorts, and how to get connected with career pathways in the Lake Norman region.

📩 Connect With Us →

🏫 Schools, Homeschool Pods & Youth Groups

Schools & Clubs

LINK Lake Norman™ partners with schools, homeschool pods, youth groups, sports teams, and civic organizations across the region. Get your students connected to real career pathways.

Partner With Future Ready™

🏫
Explore It™ — Middle School (7th & 8th)

Immersive career exploration for 7th & 8th graders. Students build life skills, discover strengths, and chart a course before high school. Available for schools, pods & youth orgs.

  • Resilience, accountability & self-discovery
  • Financial literacy & money management
  • Professional etiquette & communication
  • Course path planning aligned to goals
📩 Inquire About Explore It™
🎓
Invest In It™ — High School (Ages 16–22)

Career-connected learning with real career placement. Students explore careers hands-on, gain mentorship, and build skills that open doors to trade school, college, or direct employment.

  • Real career placement with vetted employers
  • Resume writing, interview prep & career coaching
  • Pathway exploration: trade, 2-yr, 4-yr, cert, or work
  • Bilingual students — your value rises significantly
📩 Inquire About Invest In It™
🏘️ Pod & Small Group Pricing

Designed for neighborhood pods, homeschoolers, youth groups, sports teams, church groups & small learning communities — 2-hour sessions, all materials included.
